ar.about.active: Published and visible in the community feed. Use add update to post milestone updates to subscribers.
ar.about.body: Project announcements are non-urgent updates posted to the community feed and member notification centre. Use them for programme news, volunteer recruitment, event notices, and impact updates. Unlike emergency alerts, announcements are queued and delivered on the platform's normal notification schedule.
ar.about.draft: Not visible to members; edit freely before publishing.
ar.about.paused_completed: Archived from the active feed. Subscribers are notified on completion.

ar.fields.title: Title
ar.list.subtitle: Publish initiatives and milestone updates that members can subscribe to.
ar.list.title: Project announcements
ar.subtitle: Track staged municipality and cooperative announcements.
ar.title: Community Projects
